implementation_drift.description: Multiple substring corrections (ICL not substring of In-Context Learning).

scientific_taste.description: Second mechanical PASS via strict-substring artifact. The 2507.13540 paper is the direct substantive prior art on frequency-domain ICL — the candidate's conjunction is occupied. The PASS is a strict-substring artifact. Honest flag.

honest_note: This is the SECOND mechanical PASS in batch (R045 was the first). Both are strict-substring artifacts where the candidate's content_words don't substring-match the titles even though the substantive prior art is dense. Per program.md §9 the cross-agent verification step is where this gets caught — verifier flags both as substantive FAIL.
